description: Likely selects a target object, region, or abstracted grid and outputs a smaller crop or compressed representation. Removes input color(s) [0]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: smaller output. Inferred transformation family: crop/extract/select. The rule is likely but may need pixel-level refinement.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_90c28cc7(I):
    x1 = objects(I, F, F, T)
    x2 = first(x1)
    x3 = subgrid(x2, I)
    x4 = dedupe(x3)
    x5 = rot90(x4)
    x6 = dedupe(x5)
    O = rot270(x6)
    return O
